title: Recent Connections
description: Electron desktop host concern — **Recent Connections**. Local mode runs `createKernel` in the main process and exposes IPC-backed ports; remote mode reuses the HTTP client stack. Persist most-recently used local project paths and remote API profiles.
context: Electron desktop host concern — **Recent Connections**. Local mode runs `createKernel` in the main process and exposes IPC-backed ports; remote mode reuses the HTTP client stack. Persist most-recently used local project paths and remote API profiles.

rules.requirement: recents are stored in app user data
rules: The module MUST persist an ordered MRU list on disk under the Electron app user data directory.

rules.requirement: tokens are stored with explicit user consent
rules: Remote profile tokens MUST NOT be written to logs; storage policy MUST match connect-panel (local encrypted store or OS secret store in future; v1 MAY use app-local storage with clear UX).

scenarios.requirement: recents are stored in app user data
scenarios.name: Successful remote connect appends recent

scenarios.requirement: recents are stored in app user data
scenarios.name: Recents dedupe by normalized URL
then: AND most recent moves to top

scenarios.requirement: recents are stored in app user data
scenarios.name: Clear recents removes file entries
then: AND welcome no longer lists removed hosts

scenarios.requirement: tokens are stored with explicit user consent
scenarios.name: Remember token checkbox gates persistence

scenarios.requirement: tokens are stored with explicit user consent
scenarios.name: Remember checked stores encrypted or scoped secret
then: AND next connect prefills host only or token per policy

scenarios.requirement: tokens are stored with explicit user consent
scenarios.name: Revoke clears stored token
when: user removes recent with stored token
